title: Nutty Flaky Brown Rice Crumble
description: A nutty and flaky keto-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring brown rice blended with a mix of nuts and seeds for a nostalgic twist.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup slivered almonds
ingredients.notes: Optional for added texture and nuttiness.

instructions: Combine the cooled cooked brown rice with a mix of ground flaxseed, chia seeds, and chopped walnuts in a mixing bowl.
Mix until well combined. Add any optional almonds for extra crunch if desired.
Form into small discs or crumbles and bake at 180°C (350°F) for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
